summary: Comprehensive testing of Bank2Tally automation SaaS completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI functional with minor AG Grid rendering issue.

ui_bugs.issue: AG Grid not displaying transaction data despite successful API response
ui_bugs.details: Transaction API returns 50 records correctly, but AG Grid shows empty table. Summary stats show correctly (Total: 50, Mapped: 44/50, Withdrawals: ₹87,860, Deposits: ₹42,400)

passed_tests: Backend: All 16 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Backend: User authentication (register, login, get current user)
Backend: File upload and parsing (HDFC statement with 50 transactions)
Frontend: Login page renders and functions
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with stats
Frontend: Upload page with drag-drop functionality
Frontend: File upload workflow (successful upload and redirect)
Frontend: Statements page with data display
Frontend: Rules page with form elements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AG Grid component to properly display transaction data. Data is correctly returned from API but not rendering in the table.
